title: helianthus debilis var. cucumerifolius
intro: Helianthus debilis var. cucumerifolius, also known as the Asian sunflower or Chinese sunflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine in various Asian cultures, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared through herbal infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including respiratory and skin conditions.
